introSection: Jett Star is a kiddie roller coaster located at Lark Ranch in Loogootee, Indiana, USA.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The train climbs a drive tire lift hill before dropping into a small bunny hill before turning back into the station. The coaster repeats this course multiple times.

fullText:
Jett Star is a kiddie roller coaster located at Lark Ranch in Loogootee, Indiana, USA.

The train climbs a drive tire lift hill before dropping into a small bunny hill before turning back into the station. The coaster repeats this course multiple times.
